Protocol for Responding to and Assessing Patients' Assets, Risks, and Experiences [PRAPARE]

code.text: Protocol for Responding to and Assessing Patients' Assets, Risks, and Experiences [PRAPARE]

coding.display: In the past year, have you been afraid of your partner or ex-partner?

code.text: In the past year, have you been afraid of your partner or ex-partner?

coding.display: Do you feel physically and emotionally safe where you currently live?

code.text: Do you feel physically and emotionally safe where you currently live?

coding.display: In the past year, have you spent more than 2 nights in a row in a jail, prison, detention center, or juvenile correctional facility?

code.text: In the past year, have you spent more than 2 nights in a row in a jail, prison, detention center, or juvenile correctional facility?

coding.display: Stress is when someone feels tense, nervous, anxious or can't sleep at night because their mind is troubled. How stressed are you?

code.text: Stress is when someone feels tense, nervous, anxious or can't sleep at night because their mind is troubled. How stressed are you?

coding.display: How often do you see or talk to people that you care about and feel close to (For example: talking to friends on the phone, visiting friends or family, going to church or club meetings)?

code.text: How often do you see or talk to people that you care about and feel close to (For example: talking to friends on the phone, visiting friends or family, going to church or club meetings)?

coding.display: Has lack of transportation kept you from medical appointments, meetings, work, or from getting things needed for daily living?

code.text: Has lack of transportation kept you from medical appointments, meetings, work, or from getting things needed for daily living?

coding.display: In the past year, have you or any family members you live with been unable to get any of the following when it was really needed?

code.text: In the past year, have you or any family members you live with been unable to get any of the following when it was really needed?

coding.display: I choose not to answer this question

valueCodeableConcept.text: I choose not to answer this question

coding.display: During the past year, what was the total combined income for you and the family members you live with? This information will help us determine if you are eligible for any benefits.

code.text: During the past year, what was the total combined income for you and the family members you live with? This information will help us determine if you are eligible for any benefits.

coding.display: What is your current work situation?

code.text: What is your current work situation?

coding.display: What is the highest level of school that you have finished?

code.text: What is the highest level of school that you have finished?

coding.display: What address do you live at?

code.text: What address do you live at?

coding.display: Are you worried about losing your housing?

code.text: Are you worried about losing your housing?

coding.display: What is your housing situation today?

code.text: What is your housing situation today?

coding.display: How many family members, including yourself, do you currently live with?

code.text: How many family members, including yourself, do you currently live with?

coding.display: What language are you most comfortable speaking?

code.text: What language are you most comfortable speaking?

coding.display: Have you been discharged from the armed forces of the United States?

code.text: Have you been discharged from the armed forces of the United States?

coding.display: At any point in the past 2 years, has season or migrant farm work been your or your family's main source of income?

code.text: At any point in the past 2 years, has season or migrant farm work been your or your family's main source of income?
